<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head>
    <title>Our quantum computing journey | Google Quantum AI</title>
    <link rel="shortcut icon" href="/static/site-assets/images/marketing/favicon.png">
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="viewport-fit=cover, width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, height=device-height">
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://dreamcoat-guggenheim.uc.r.appspot.com/assets/images/map/share.jpg">
    <meta name="twitter:image" content="https://dreamcoat-guggenheim.uc.r.appspot.com/assets/images/map/share.jpg">
    <meta property="og:title" content="Our quantum computing journey – Google Quantum AI">
    <meta property="og:site_name" content="Google Quantum AI">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://dreamcoat-guggenheim.uc.r.appspot.com/learn/map/">
    <meta name="description" content="A useful, error-corrected quantum computer is within reach for humanity. There's still a lot of work to do, but we think we might be able to accomplish our goal within the decade. Learn more about what it will take.">
    <meta property="og:description" content="A useful, error-corrected quantum computer is within reach for humanity. There's still a lot of work to do, but we think we might be able to accomplish our goal within the decade. Learn more about what it will take.">
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
    <meta name="twitter:site" content="@Google">
    <meta name="twitter:title" content="Our quantum computing journey | Google Quantum AI">
    <meta name="twitter:description" content="A useful, error-corrected quantum computer is within reach for humanity. There's still a lot of work to do, but we think we might be able to accomplish our goal within the decade. Learn more about what it will take.">
    <style>
      iframe {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        right: 0;
        width: 100%;
        border: none;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        z-index: 999999;
        height: 100%;
      }

      html,
      body {
        overscroll-behavior: none;
      }
    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
